name: Permissive Regular Expression
description: The product uses a regular expression that does not sufficiently restrict the set of allowed values, often due to missing anchors or overly broad wildcards. This allows input that only partially matches the intended pattern to pass validation.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node passes data through a CONTROL node performing regex validation, but the regex lacks anchors (^ and $) or uses overly permissive patterns. Data then flows to TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes with insufficient restriction.
